signals.npcLine: Crypto tides turn; shadows grow longer in market streets.
signals.questPulse: Seek stability amid slipping digital currency walls.
signals.worldFeed: Global coin count high, but confidence dims under fear.
signals.clueEvent: Market cap sheds old weight, whispers of decline.

signals.npcLine: MOVR and SPK buzz in back-alley trades, watch them close.
signals.questPulse: Track rising signals in obscure crypto nodes, exploit gaps.
signals.worldFeed: Some coins gain pulse; others fade into neon static.
signals.clueEvent: New pulse sparks in mid-tier currencies; shadows shift.

signals.npcLine: Fear grips markets; whispers say the biggest falls ahead.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt volatile moves before circuits short and burn out.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment index near low; expect chaos in next pulse.
signals.clueEvent: Sentiment dips below critical, signaling potential collapse.

signals.npcLine: PENGU and SPK hold secrets for those who dare to dig.
signals.questPulse: Gather intel on hidden coin flows; stakes rising rapidly.
signals.worldFeed: Trends shift slowly; undercurrents hint at sudden surges.
signals.clueEvent: Rising scores in lesser-known tokens call for attention.

signals.npcLine: Old timer warns: BTC holds its pulse, but winds feel cold.
signals.questPulse: Stay alert, veteran coins may trigger unexpected shifts.
signals.worldFeed: Dominant coin flickers, a beacon or a trap remains unclear.
signals.clueEvent: BTC sentiment cautiously steady in fearful shadows.
